mapper.select: select id, route_name, city, days, budget, theme, route_desc from travel_route order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into travel_route (route_name, city, days, budget, theme, route_desc) values (#{routeName}, #{city}, #{days}, #{budget}, #{theme}, #{routeDesc})
mapper.update: update travel_route set route_name = #{routeName}, city = #{city}, days = #{days}, budget = #{budget}, theme = #{theme}, route_desc = #{routeDesc} where id = #{id}
